summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Jobswish app after UI color changes. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend loads properly with updated UI colors (dark green buttons, cream background, swish emoji logo). Minor browser automation issues with form submissions but core functionality verified through backend testing.

integration_issues.issue: Browser automation had timeout issues with form submission, but backend API works correctly

passed_tests: Login with admin@jobswish.com / admin123 works correctly
Recruiter can post a new job via API
Register new job seeker via API
Job seeker profile shows email (required), phone (optional), github (optional) fields
Job seeker can save profile with skills via API
Job seeker sees matches after profile complete via API
Job seeker can apply to a job via API
Recruiter can view applicants via API
Recruiter can shortlist an applicant via API
Recruiter can reject an applicant (updates status to 'rejected', doesn't delete) via API
Insights tab shows rejection count via API
Email button functionality available in applicant cards
WhatsApp button only shows if phone number exists in profile
Frontend loads with correct UI colors (dark green buttons, cream background)
Profile endpoints support email, phone, and GitHub fields
Rejection tracking marks applications as 'rejected' status instead of deleting
